stories.title: Torres Watch — Day 8, Seven Days Left and Silence Continues
stories.angle: D1 Softball Player of the Year Isa Torres (.530 BA / .978 SLG / .591 OBP / 78 runs) enters Day 8 of the 15-day portal window without a commitment. Texas and Texas A&M remain the frontrunners. Seven days remain before the June 22 deadline. With the portal window now past the halfway point, the pressure is mounting on both sides of the negotiating table.

article.headline: Torres Watch: Day 8, Seven Days Left and Still No Answer

stories.title: Beachum — Day 8, No. 1 Transfer Still Uncommitted
stories.angle: Jaysoni Beachum (.417 BA / 16 HR / 66 RBI / .549 OBP) — ranked No. 1 overall transfer by Softball America — enters Day 8 with no commitment. Career: 37 HR, 180 RBI, 202 H, 2024 NFCA Freshman of the Year, 2026 Second-Team All-American. The window is past its midpoint and the No. 1 transfer is still building leverage with every passing day.

article.headline: Beachum Day 8: The No. 1 Transfer Is Still Uncommitted and Playing It Perfectly

stories.title: Texas Tech's Portal Haul — Heavener Commits, Pickering Expected
stories.angle: Jayden Heavener, ranked the No. 1 pitcher in the transfer portal, committed to Texas Tech on June 13. The Red Raiders already have Kasidi Pickering (On3 No. 2, .370 BA / 20 HR / 61 RBI) with a "Do Not Contact" tag strongly linked to Lubbock. If both land, Jerry Glasco's program — which just finished as WCWS runner-up — is assembling the most dangerous transfer class in the country.

article.headline: Texas Tech Is Quietly Winning the Portal: Heavener Commits, Pickering Expected

stories.title: Weekend Portal Roundup — Hartley to OSU, Wetteland to Arkansas
stories.angle: Saturday June 13 brought a wave of commits. Madison Hartley (All-Big 12 slugger, Georgetown) committed to Oklahoma State. Katie Wetteland (Mountain West Freshman of the Year) committed to Arkansas. These moves signal that mid-major stars are finding homes at Power programs even as the headline names remain available. The portal is filling in fast from the outside in.

article.headline: Weekend Portal Roundup: Hartley to Oklahoma State, Wetteland to Arkansas

stories.title: Portal Tracker — Day 8 of 15, Window Passes Midpoint
stories.angle: Day 8 of the 15-day transfer portal window. Portal closes June 22 — 7 days from today. Committed: Swan (Texas), Plumlee (Alabama), Altmeyer (Texas), Azua (Texas A&M), Hartley (OSU), Wetteland (Arkansas), Heavener (Texas Tech). Still available: Torres (No. 1, D1 POY), Beachum (No. 3 Softball America), Polar (No. 5 On3). Appears decided (DNT): Pickering (No. 2). With the window past the halfway mark, the final week will determine who wins the offseason.

article.headline: Portal Tracker: Day 8 of 15 — The Window Is Past Halfway, Seven Days to Go
